creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 240034
Patch for jpeg-turbo

* Minor rearrangement of Makefile for better readbility
* Adjust port to not override cflags defined by framework

Compile and runtime tested on FreeBSD 13.1-STABLE (amd64) (make, make test, make check-plist)
Poudriere testport OK 12.3-RELEASE (amd64)
Poudriere testport OK 13.1-RELEASE (i386)
